P0171.name: System Too Lean Bank 1
P0171.causes: Vacuum leak, dirty MAF sensor, weak fuel pump, clogged injectors
P0171.hyundai_note: Common on Creta 1.5 petrol after 40,000 km due to intake manifold gasket wear

P0217.name: Engine Coolant Over Temperature
P0217.causes: Low coolant, thermostat failure, water pump failure, head gasket issue
P0217.hyundai_note: Pull over immediately. Continuing to drive risks catastrophic engine damage

P0300.name: Random Misfire Detected
P0300.causes: Worn spark plugs, faulty ignition coil, fuel delivery issue
P0300.hyundai_note: Check coil-on-plug connectors first on Creta petrol variants

P0420.name: Catalyst System Efficiency Below Threshold
P0420.causes: Failing catalytic converter, oxygen sensor fault, exhaust leak
P0420.hyundai_note: Common after 80,000 km. Can wait for scheduled service

P0507.name: Idle Control System RPM High
P0507.causes: Vacuum leak, dirty throttle body, faulty IAC valve
P0507.hyundai_note: Throttle body cleaning often resolves this on Creta
